preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Bacteriology Laboratory' AND is_template = true

column.name: title
column.value: Bacteriology Laboratory

column.name: objective
column.value: Complete bacteriology workflow from sample reception to archiving

column.name: protocol
column.value: Standard Bacteriology Laboratory Protocol

column.name: content
column.value: Bacteriology Laboratory notebook template with workflow pages for clinical, environmental, food/beverage, and veterinary sample processing.

changeSet.author: openelis-bacteriology

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Bacteriology Laboratory' AND is_template = true
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook_page np JOIN clinlims.notebook n ON np.notebook_id = n.id WHERE n.title = 'Bacteriology Laboratory' AND n.is_template = true AND np.page_order = 1

changeSet.comment: Create Sample Reception page for Bacteriology Laboratory notebook

column.name: title
column.value: Sample Reception

column.name: instructions
column.value: Import sample manifest and verify sample receipt. Check that all samples match the manifest. Inspect for damage, proper labeling, and temperature compliance. Capture all reception metadata including project information, participant details, collection data, storage conditions, and consent status.

column.name: content
notebook_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Bacteriology Laboratory' AND is_template = true)

delete.where: notebook_id = (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Bacteriology Laboratory' AND is_template = true) AND page_order = 1

changeSet.author: openelis-bacteriology

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Bacteriology Laboratory' AND is_template = true
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook_page np JOIN clinlims.notebook n ON np.notebook_id = n.id WHERE n.title = 'Bacteriology Laboratory' AND n.is_template = true AND np.page_order = 2

changeSet.comment: Create Laboratory Reception and Verification page for Bacteriology Laboratory notebook

column.name: title
column.value: Laboratory Reception & Verification

column.name: instructions
column.value: Confirm physical receipt and validate sample quality. Use the QC checklist to assess temperature compliance, volume, labeling, packaging integrity, contamination, leakage, and container type. Passed samples proceed to Temporary Storage Assignment. Failed samples can be discarded or kept with flagged status.

column.name: content
notebook_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Bacteriology Laboratory' AND is_template = true)

delete.where: notebook_id = (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Bacteriology Laboratory' AND is_template = true) AND page_order = 2

changeSet.author: openelis-bacteriology

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Bacteriology Laboratory' AND is_template = true
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook_page np JOIN clinlims.notebook n ON np.notebook_id = n.id WHERE n.title = 'Bacteriology Laboratory' AND n.is_template = true AND np.page_order = 3

changeSet.comment: Create Temporary Storage Assignment page for Bacteriology Laboratory notebook

column.name: title
column.value: Sample Storage Assignment

column.name: instructions
column.value: Assign samples to storage locations after QC. Select storage type (Temporary for awaiting processing, Long-Term for processed samples/isolates). Use hierarchy: Room → Device/Freezer → Shelf → Rack → Box → Well. Record exact placement for retrieval. Log temperature readings twice daily (AM/PM) with staff initials.

column.name: content
notebook_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Bacteriology Laboratory' AND is_template = true)

delete.where: notebook_id = (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Bacteriology Laboratory' AND is_template = true) AND page_order = 3

changeSet.author: openelis-bacteriology

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.workflow_page_template WHERE workflow_category = 'BACTERIOLOGY'

changeSet.comment: Insert predefined Bacteriology workflow page templates

column.name: name
column.value: Sample Reception

column.name: description
column.value: Import manifest and capture incoming samples with full reception metadata

column.name: default_instructions
column.value: Import sample manifest (CSV/Excel) with: Project Name, Study ID, Participant ID, Barcode, Collection Site, Sample Type, Collection Date/Time, Received Date/Time, Storage Container, Temperature on Arrival, Received By, Consent Status, CRF Status, Sample Origin, Source Location/Facility. System validates and generates IDs.

column.name: default_content
column.value: Sample Reception - Manifest import and batch verification

column.name: name
column.value: Laboratory Reception & Verification

column.name: description
column.value: Quality control assessment with checklist for temperature compliance, volume, labeling, packaging, contamination, leakage, and container type

column.name: default_instructions
column.value: Confirm physical receipt and validate sample quality. Use QC checklist to assess all criteria. Pass samples proceed to storage. Failed samples: discard or keep with flagged status. Rejection reasons: Mislabeling, Insufficient volume, Contaminated samples, Damaged container, Expired transport medium, Temperature excursion, Other.

column.name: default_content
column.value: Laboratory Reception and Verification - Quality Control Assessment

column.name: name
column.value: Temporary Storage Assignment

column.name: description
column.value: Assign samples to temporary storage locations with storage hierarchy and environmental monitoring

column.name: default_instructions
column.value: Select storage hierarchy (Room → Freezer → Rack → Box → Well). Use auto-populate or manual well assignment. Choose storage condition (Room Temp, Refrigerated, Frozen -20°C, -80°C, Liquid Nitrogen, Incubator). Log environmental monitoring data (temperature checks AM/PM).

column.name: default_content
column.value: Temporary Storage Assignment - Storage and Environmental Monitoring

changeSet.author: openelis-bacteriology

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Bacteriology Laboratory' AND is_template = true
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.test_section WHERE name = 'Bacteriology'

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook_departments nd JOIN clinlims.notebook n ON nd.notebook_id = n.id JOIN clinlims.test_section ts ON nd.test_section_id = ts.id WHERE n.title = 'Bacteriology Laboratory' AND ts.name = 'Bacteriology'

changeSet.comment: Link Bacteriology Laboratory notebook template to Bacteriology department
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO clinlims.notebook_departments (notebook_id, test_section_id) SELECT n.id, ts.id FROM clinlims.notebook n, clinlims.test_section ts WHERE n.title = 'Bacteriology Laboratory' AND n.is_template = true AND ts.name = 'Bacteriology';

changeSet.author: openelis-bacteriology
changeSet.comment: Ensure Bacteriology Laboratory notebook has all active organizations assigned.
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO clinlims.notebook_organizations (notebook_id, organization_id) SELECT n.id, o.id FROM clinlims.notebook n CROSS JOIN clinlims.organization o WHERE n.title = 'Bacteriology Laboratory' AND n.is_template = true AND o.is_active = 'Y' AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM clinlims.notebook_organizations no WHERE no.notebook_id = n.id AND no.organization_id = o.id );
